news_data.title: Grab Dominates Southeast Asian Ride-Hailing With 72% Market Share
news_data.snippet: Grab maintains commanding lead in ride-hailing across Singapore, Indonesia, Thailand, and Vietnam.

news_data.title: Grab Financial Group Secures Digital Banking License
news_data.snippet: GrabFin launches digital banking services in Singapore, expanding its fintech ecosystem.

news_data.title: Grab Posts First-Ever Quarterly Profit
news_data.snippet: Grab achieved GAAP profitability for the first time, driven by cost discipline and improving unit economics.

news_data.title: Grab Expands GrabMart Grocery Delivery Across Region
news_data.snippet: Quick commerce segment grows 45% YoY as consumers in SE Asia shift to on-demand grocery delivery.

news_data.title: Grab SPAC Valuation Still Below $40B Peak
news_data.snippet: Shares remain well below 2021 SPAC debut price, though recovery trend emerges as fundamentals improve.

social_data.title: Grab Is the Super App of SE Asia
social_data.snippet: Use Grab for rides, food, payments, insurance. In Singapore you literally can't avoid it.

social_data.title: Grab Driver Earnings Discussion
social_data.snippet: Earnings per hour have dropped vs 2022 but still decent. Too many new drivers flooding the platform.

social_data.title: Grab vs GoTo Competition Thread
social_data.snippet: Grab is winning on execution but GoTo has deeper local roots in Indonesia. Both losing money though.

review_data.title: Grab Employee Review — Product Manager
review_data.snippet: Fast-paced, startup-like culture even at scale. Great regional exposure. Compensation competitive for SE Asia.

review_data.title: Grab Employee Review — Data Scientist
review_data.snippet: Interesting problems at massive scale. Work-life balance is hit or miss depending on team.
